ankle-hop-stick.easier: Smaller hop, or land softly on two feet.
ankle-hop-stick.harder: A little higher, or hop and land on one foot.

wall-drive-hold.easier: Shorter holds, or stand a bit more upright.
wall-drive-hold.harder: Switch the driving leg, or trade legs back and forth.

a-skip-moving.easier: March it out, or skip on the spot.
a-skip-moving.harder: Skip a little faster, or skip into a short run.

band-glute-bridge.easier: Lighter band, or no band at all.
band-glute-bridge.harder: Lift one foot off, or hold a moment at the top.

crossover-step.easier: Walk slowly through the crossover steps.
crossover-step.harder: Add a surprise go-signal, or sprint out of it.

reactive-5m-sprint.easier: Start on your own count, or run a shorter distance.
reactive-5m-sprint.harder: Run a little farther, or react to a surprise go-signal.

banded-standing-adduction.easier: Lighter band, or a smaller pull inward.
banded-standing-adduction.harder: Heavier band, or move slower and more controlled.

dead-bug-with-db.easier: Drop the weight and just use your arms and legs.
dead-bug-with-db.harder: Hold a light dumbbell, or move both arms and legs together.

jump-rope-steady.easier: Shorter turns, or step over the rope instead of jumping.
jump-rope-steady.harder: Jump a bit longer, or keep a quicker steady pace.

bear-crawl-variations.easier: Crawl forward only, slower, and a shorter distance.
bear-crawl-variations.harder: Crawl farther, change directions, or carry a light weight.

fast-feet-ladder-equiv.easier: Walk slowly through the foot pattern.
fast-feet-ladder-equiv.harder: Quicker feet, or a slightly trickier pattern.

reactive-lateral-start.easier: Start on your own count, or use just one direction.
reactive-lateral-start.harder: React to a surprise go-signal, or add more directions.

deep-squat-hold.easier: Hold onto something, or put a small lift under your heels.
deep-squat-hold.harder: Hold a little longer, or hug a light weight to your chest.

sl-balance-eyes-closed.easier: Open your eyes, or lightly touch something for balance.
sl-balance-eyes-closed.harder: Stand on a soft surface, or add a slow head turn.

plank-shoulder-tap.easier: Wider feet, or do it from the knees.
plank-shoulder-tap.harder: Bring the feet closer, or tap slower and more controlled.

hollow-rock.easier: Bend the knees and tuck in while you rock.
hollow-rock.harder: Reach arms all the way overhead, or hold a light weight.

depth-drop-low-box.easier: Lower box, or just step down and stick the landing.
depth-drop-low-box.harder: Slightly higher box, or land on one foot.

a-skip-march-combo.easier: March only, or do it on the spot.
a-skip-march-combo.harder: Finish by skipping into a short run.

banded-front-squat.easier: Lighter band, or a plain bodyweight squat.
banded-front-squat.harder: Heavier band, or pause for a moment at the bottom.

banded-chop-lift.easier: Lighter band, or a smaller motion.
banded-chop-lift.harder: Heavier band, do it standing, or add a slight twist.

lateral-skater-bound.easier: Hop side to side with a brief pause to stick each landing.
lateral-skater-bound.harder: Cover more side-to-side distance, or add a surprise go-signal.

single-leg-pogo-hops.easier: Hop on two feet, or keep the hops lower.
single-leg-pogo-hops.harder: Bouncier or quicker hops, or hop while moving forward.

crossover-step-to-sprint.easier: Walk slowly through the change into a jog.
crossover-step-to-sprint.harder: Add a surprise go-signal, or sprint a little farther.

reactive-mirror-sprint.easier: Go slower, fewer directions, or have the leader signal early.
reactive-mirror-sprint.harder: Bigger, faster moves, or add more directions to follow.

sl-box-step-down.easier: Lower box, or only step down part way.
sl-box-step-down.harder: Slightly higher box, or hold a light dumbbell.

banded-rdl.easier: Lighter band, or hinge only part way down.
banded-rdl.harder: Heavier band, or pause at the bottom of the hinge.

tall-plank-db-drag.easier: Lighter weight, wider feet, or do it from the knees.
tall-plank-db-drag.harder: Heavier weight, or bring the feet closer together.

jump-rope-intervals.easier: Shorter jumping, longer rests, or just steady skipping.
jump-rope-intervals.harder: Longer or quicker jumping bouts, or shorter rests.

multi-direction-bound.easier: Fewer directions, or stick each landing before the next.
multi-direction-bound.harder: Quicker changes, or react to a surprise go-signal.

a-skip-b-skip.easier: Just the A-skip, or slowly march the B pattern.
a-skip-b-skip.harder: Skip a little faster, or skip into a short run.

reactive-4-cone.easier: Fewer cones, slower signals, or know the order ahead of time.
reactive-4-cone.harder: More cones, faster signals, or carry a puck.

iso-wall-sit.easier: Hold for less time, or sit a little higher.
iso-wall-sit.harder: Rest a light weight on your lap, or sit on one leg.

high-low-pogo-combo.easier: Steady hops that all stay the same height.
high-low-pogo-combo.harder: Hop on one foot, or switch heights more quickly.

resisted-free-sprint.easier: Lighter resistance, or do the two parts separately.
resisted-free-sprint.harder: Smooth the hand-off into the free run, or run farther free.

db-goblet-lateral-lunge.easier: No weight, or only lunge part way down.
db-goblet-lateral-lunge.harder: Hold a heavier dumbbell, or pause at the bottom.

sprint-intervals-15s.easier: Fewer sprints, longer rests, or shorter sprints.
sprint-intervals-15s.harder: More sprints, shorter rests, or run each one a bit longer.

jump-rope-speed.easier: Quick single spins, or shorter fast bursts.
jump-rope-speed.harder: Two spins per jump, or quicker bursts.

crossover-step-bound.easier: Slower crossover steps without a big push-off.
crossover-step-bound.harder: Quicker or longer bounds, or add a band for resistance.

hill-stride.easier: A gentler slope, or a shorter distance.
hill-stride.harder: A steeper hill, or longer, quicker strides.

plank-to-push-up.easier: From the knees, or move slowly between positions.
plank-to-push-up.harder: Bring the feet closer, or slow the up-and-down on purpose.

20m-flying-sprint.easier: Shorten to a 10 m fly, or run easy build-up strides.
20m-flying-sprint.harder: Make the fly zone longer, or add a gentle downhill run.

broad-jump.easier: A shorter jump, or step back to reset each time.
broad-jump.harder: Jump again right away, or jump into a short sprint.

20m-sprint.easier: Short 10 m starts focused on the first hard pushes.
20m-sprint.harder: Add a band or sled at the start, or run out to 30 m.

squat-to-tuck-jump.easier: A plain jump squat with no knee tuck, or lower jumps.
squat-to-tuck-jump.harder: Tuck the knees higher, or jump again without resetting.

a-skip-resisted.easier: Lighter resistance, or skip with no resistance at all.
a-skip-resisted.harder: More resistance, or skip into a resisted short run.

banded-squat-jump.easier: Lighter band, or a plain bodyweight squat jump.
banded-squat-jump.harder: Heavier band, or hold a light weight as you jump.

rotational-med-ball-toss.easier: Lighter ball, or slower reps to groove the motion.
rotational-med-ball-toss.harder: Heavier ball, or throw farther and more explosively.

rotational-med-ball-side-toss.easier: Lighter ball, or slower reps to groove the motion.
rotational-med-ball-side-toss.harder: Heavier ball, or throw with more snap.

mirror-sprint-game.easier: Smaller space, slower leader, or fewer directions.
mirror-sprint-game.harder: Bigger space, more directions, or add a puck or ball.

banded-rotational-press.easier: Lighter band, or a smaller motion.
banded-rotational-press.harder: Heavier band, or press with more snap.

sl-cmj-stick.easier: A smaller jump, or jump and land on two feet.
sl-cmj-stick.harder: Jump higher, or add a reach or light weight.

squat-to-broad-jump.easier: A quicker pause, or a shorter jump.
squat-to-broad-jump.harder: A longer pause, a deeper squat, or hold a light weight.

contrast-jump.easier: A lighter warm-up move, or just the explosive jumps on their own.
contrast-jump.harder: Dial in the rest between moves, or use a heavier warm-up first.

banded-rotational-throw-wall.easier: Lighter band, or slower reps to groove the motion.
banded-rotational-throw-wall.harder: Heavier band, or throw with more snap.

continuous-lateral-bound.easier: Add a brief pause to stick each landing.
continuous-lateral-bound.harder: Cover more distance or reps, or clear a small target.

band-rotational-scoop-toss.easier: Lighter band, or a smaller motion.
band-rotational-scoop-toss.harder: Heavier band, or scoop with more snap.

repeat-efforts-shift-simulation.easier: Fewer shifts, shorter bursts, or longer rests on the bench.
repeat-efforts-shift-simulation.harder: More shifts, longer bursts, or shorter rests between them.

repeat-sprint-ability.easier: Fewer sprints, longer rests, or more recovery between sets.
repeat-sprint-ability.harder: More sprints, or shorter rests between them.
